title: Supplementary Data for "Mechanism of Mg2+ Mediated Encapsulation of an Anionic Cognate Ligand in a Bacterial Riboswitch"
author: Kumar, Sunil
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the raw data and analysis script for " Mechanism of Mg 2+  Mediated Encapsulation of an Anionic Cognate Ligand in a Bacterial Riboswitch " by  Sunil Kumar and Govardhan Reddy . 

 See  README.txt  file for the format and description of the data set. 

 For each [Mg 2+ ], we have 6 independent trajectories (e.g. MG_1mM_F5 to MG_1mM_F10). All the thermodynamic properties for a given [Mg 2+ ], as reported in the manuscript were computed after combining all six independent trajectories.  

 Refer to   "Mechanism of Mg2+ Mediated Encapsulation of an Anionic Cognate Ligand in a Bacterial Riboswitch"  for the preprint version of the manuscript.
